assumptions: BARC address block claiming, ABI assignment, CA assignment, and multicast registration are treated as already completed before tick 0.
Collective multicast forwarding uses precomputed CA egress state derived from the fixed topology and host placement.
The data-plane behavior under study is stateless forwarding, congestion, drops, observability, and future repair traffic.
The recovery policy is not enabled by default; only the stateless unicast primitive needed by repair is implemented.
If startOffsetTicks is used, host data availability is still tick 0; offset waiting time is intentionally counted in CCT/FCT.

spineHeatmapAdvisor.note: Offsets are advisory; when applied through startOffsetTicks, waiting time is included in CCT/FCT from tick 0.

The data-plane behavior under study is stateless forwarding, congestion, drops, observability, and future repair traffic.
The recovery policy is not enabled by default; only the stateless unicast primitive needed by repair is implemented.
If startOffsetTicks is used, host data availability is still tick 0; offset waiting time is intentionally counted in CCT/FCT.

spineHeatmapAdvisor.note: Offsets are advisory; when applied through startOffsetTicks, waiting time is included in CCT/FCT from tick 0.
